name: How much is my broken leg from work worth in Sandy?
description: Medical + 66% wages + permanent rating value; lawyer assesses.[1]

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken leg from work worth in Sandy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + 66% wages + permanent rating value; lawyer assesses.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Varies by medical costs, lost wages, impairment rating; permanent partial based on stability.[1] No strict caps like some damages.[8] Key factors: Doctor rates impairment; total disability if can't work anywhere.[1] Calculate via benefits formula.[1] Lawyer values accurately.[1]
